title: ObsidianResult
description: Obsidian CLI result envelope. Captures the rendered command vector, status, target vault, command-specific data payload, optional raw text, and a human-readable error. Data shape is intentionally freeform because the underlying obsidian CLI returns different shapes per command family (vault, file, search, daily, tags, tasks, command, eval).

correlationId.description: Optional correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

command.description: The full command vector that was executed, e.g. ['obsidian', 'read', 'file=notes/foo.md'].

status.description: ok when the official obsidian CLI exited zero; error otherwise.

vault.description: Vault name when the CLI was invoked against a specific vault.

data.description: Command-specific payload. Shape varies by command family; refer to the skill's command reference for the per-command shape.

rawOutput.description: Original stdout captured from the obsidian CLI when structured data is not available, or when raw passthrough is useful for the caller.

error.description: Human-readable error message when status is 'error'.
